ID_PAG_DEV		INTEGER		PK NOT NULL
ID_ITEM_PAGAMENTO	SMALLINT	NOT NULL
ID_PAGAMENTO		SMALLINT	NOT NULL
TIPO			VARCHAR(18)	NOT NULL
VALOR_PAGO		DECIMAL(15,2)	NOT NULL
DATA_PAGAMENTO		TIMESTAMP	NOT NULL
HORA_PAGAMENTO		TIME		NOT NULL
ID_DEVOLUCAO		INTEGER		NOT NULL

/******************************************************************************/
/****              Generated by IBExpert 22/08/2022 11:25:09               ****/
/******************************************************************************/

set sql dialect 3;

set names none;



/******************************************************************************/
/****                                Tables                                ****/
/******************************************************************************/


create generator gen_pagamento_devolucao_id;

create table pagamento_devolucao (
    id_pag_dev         integer not null,
    id_item_pagamento  smallint not null,
    id_pagamento       smallint not null,
    tipo               varchar(18) not null,
    valor_pago         decimal(15,2) not null,
    data_pagamento     timestamp not null,
    hora_pagamento     time not null,
    id_devolucao       integer not null
);




/******************************************************************************/
/****                             Primary Keys                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

alter table pagamento_devolucao add constraint pk_pagamento_devolucao primary key (id_pag_dev);


/******************************************************************************/
/****                             Foreign Keys                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

alter table pagamento_devolucao add constraint fk_pagamento_devolucao_1 foreign key (id_devolucao) references devolucao (id_devolucao);
alter table pagamento_devolucao add constraint fk_pagamento_devolucao_2 foreign key (id_pagamento) references forma_pagamento (id_pagamento);


/******************************************************************************/
/****                               Triggers                               ****/
/******************************************************************************/


set term ^ ;


/******************************************************************************/
/****                         Triggers for tables                          ****/
/******************************************************************************/



/* Trigger: PAGAMENTO_DEVOLUCAO_BI */
create trigger pagamento_devolucao_bi for pagamento_devolucao
active before insert position 0
as
begin
  if (new.id_pag_dev is null) then
    new.id_pag_dev = gen_id(gen_pagamento_devolucao_id,1);
end
^


set term ; ^
